name: zvid_texture_pack_load_builtin_image_by_name
description: zVid_TexturePack_LoadBuiltinImageByName searches the builtin texture-pack table for a named image.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zvideo_texture_pack_image_helpers failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 273 unmasked mismatches, 12 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 285, VC object size 32, 7 trailing VC NOPs trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zvideo_texture_pack_image_helpers/verify/46dd30_byte_triage.txt.
Current native smoke covers the missing-builtin lookup path through zImage::TexDir_FindOrCreateByPath.
